nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Oenanthe
nodes.summary: Oenanthe（Oenanthe）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联29种鸟类，如漠䳭、Western black-eared wheatear、白顶䳭等29种鸟类。

nodes.name: White-fronted black chat
nodes.summary: White-fronted black chat（Oenanthe albifrons）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-fronted black chat。

nodes.name: White-fronted black chat
nodes.summary: The white-fronted black chat (Oenanthe albifrons) is a species of passerine bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is native to the Sudan (region). Its natural habitats are moist savanna and subtropical or tropical dry shrubland. The white-fronted black chat was formerly included in the genus Myrmecocichla. Molecular phylogenetic studies published in 2010 and 2012 found that the species was phylogenetically nested within the genus Oenanthe. As part of a reorganization of the chat species to create monophyletic genera, the white-fronted black chat was moved to the genus Oenanthe. References
